data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO PLFS 2022-23, estimated share of informal employment in Maharashtra
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS tracker data 2023; coalition instability between Mahayuti (BJP+Shinde Sena+NCP-Ajit) and MVA reduces trust
data_sources.political_contestation_index: ECI 2024 data; Maharashtra has highest coalition fragmentation among major states, 0.82 reflects effective parties and split vote shares
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: Census 2011 language data; 0.9 reflects Marathi-Hindi bilingual zone where information diffuses across both language networks
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India 2023 (tv), IRS 2022 (print), IAMAI-Kantar 2023 (digital), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Maharashtra Industrial Relations Act framework assessed as moderate; neither strongly permissive nor restrictive
data_sources.examination_board: Both Maharashtra State Board (MSBSHSE) and CBSE operate extensively
